title: marizia anthemoides
intro: Marizia anthemoides, also known as Anthemis marizii, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Marizia anthemoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used in tea form, infusion, or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
